description: Create a fixed asset record for a 'John Deere 6120M' tractor purchase with a gross amount of 78,500.00 EUR. Use the Linear (Straight-line) depreciation method starting 2025-01-15 for a duration of 7 years (84 months). Assign the following accounts: Asset (2154xx - Material/Tooling), Allocation (28154xx - Depreciation of material), and Expenses (68112xx - Depreciation charges).
